step_rationale: Leukocyte adhesion molecule; central hub gene in AMI inflammatory pathways; recruits immune cells to plaque.
mechanism: ITGAL mediates monocyte and T-cell recruitment into atherosclerotic plaques and crosstalk with platelet surfaces, amplifying plaque inflammation.

references.title: Multiomics Analysis Identifies Candidate Molecular, Microbiota, and Metabolite Features Associated with Acute Myocardial Infarction Combined with Chronic Renal Failure.
references.journal: Omics : a journal of integrative biology

references.title: Key immune-related hub genes BTK, ITGAL and PTX3 mediate macrophage phenotypic shift and foam cell formation in the periodontitis-atherosclerosis axis.
Urokinase receptor surface expression regulates monocyte adhesion in acute myocardial infarction.
